title: Land Rights Initiative turns 11!
description: Founded on 11/11/2014 at Harvard Law School, and incubated at the Centre for Policy Research, LRI turns 11 today! The world today is remarkably different than at the time of LRI’s founding. Climate devastation, wars, internal armed conflict, and growing political and social polarisation have created unprecedented pressure on existing policy imaginaries relating to land, […] The post Land Rights Initiative turns 11! appeared first on CPR.
